en.title: PSD to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert Adobe Photoshop (PSD) files to PDF format. Supports multiple files and preserves image quality.
en.description:
PSD to PDF converts Adobe Photoshop (PSD) files into PDF documents. This tool allows you to view and share PSD designs without needing Photoshop installed.

You can convert multiple PSD files at once and combine them into a single PDF document. The tool processes each PSD file, rendering the visible layers into high-quality PDF pages.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your designs remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload PSD Files
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PSD or PSB files, or click to select them from your device.

howToUse.title: Arrange Order
howToUse.description: Drag and drop the file thumbnails to arrange them in the desired order.

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Click Convert to render the PSDs and download your PDF document.

useCases.title: Share Designs
useCases.description: Share Photoshop designs with clients or colleagues who don't have Photoshop.

useCases.title: Portfolio Creation
useCases.description: Compile your design work into a professional PDF portfolio.

useCases.title: Print Preparation
useCases.description: Convert designs to PDF for printing purposes.

faq.question: Do I need Photoshop installed?
faq.answer: No, this tool works entirely in your browser without requiring Adobe Photoshop.

faq.question: Are layers preserved?
faq.answer: The tool renders the visible state of the PSD (composite image). Individual layers are flattened in the PDF.

faq.question: What is the maximum file size?
faq.answer: You can upload files up to 100MB each. Large PSD files may take a moment to process.

非常适合设计师和艺术家与没有安装Photoshop的客户或同事分享他们的作品。转换生成干净、可视化的PDF文档。

所有处理都在本地完成，确保您的设计和作品保留在设备上，保持私密和安全。

en.title: Word to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert Word documents (DOCX) to PDF. Preserve formatting and layout in your converted documents.
en.description:
Word to PDF converts Microsoft Word documents into PDF format while preserving the original formatting, layout, and content structure.

Upload your DOCX files and get high-quality PDF output suitable for sharing, printing, or archiving. The conversion maintains text formatting, paragraph styles, and basic document structure.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

en.title: Excel to PDF

Upload your XLSX files and get clean PDF output with properly formatted tables. Each sheet in your workbook becomes a separate section in the PDF.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your data remains private and secure.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

faq.question: Are multi-page XPS files supported?

MOBI转PDF将亚马逊Kindle电子书文件转换为高质量的PDF文档。MOBI格式（包括AZW和AZW3）是亚马逊专有的电子书格式，用于Kindle设备。

此工具可保留Kindle书籍的文本格式、图片和结构。非常适合打印、存档或在不支持MOBI格式的设备上阅读。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，使用先进的渲染技术，确保您的书籍保持私密。

useCases.title: 存档书籍

faq.question: 支持哪些MOBI格式？
faq.answer: 此工具支持.mobi、.azw和.azw3文件（非DRM版本）。

faq.question: 支持受DRM保护的Kindle书籍吗？
faq.answer: 不支持，受DRM保护的电子书无法转换。仅支持无DRM的文件。

faq.question: 格式会保留吗？
faq.answer: 是的！该工具使用原生MOBI渲染来保留文本、图片和布局。

en.title: PDF to SVG
en.metaDescription: Convert PDF pages to SVG vector graphics. Perfect scalability at any size with individual page export.
en.description:
PDF to SVG converts each page of your PDF document into a scalable vector graphic (SVG). SVG is a vector format that maintains perfect quality at any zoom level or print size.

Unlike raster formats (JPG, PNG), SVG graphics never become pixelated when scaled. This makes them ideal for logos, diagrams, technical drawings, and any content that needs to be displayed at different sizes.

Preview each converted page and download them individually or as a ZIP file. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy for your documents.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to browse and select.

howToUse.title: Configure Options
howToUse.description: Set the resolution quality and optionally specify page ranges.

howToUse.title: Preview and Convert
howToUse.description: Click Convert to process. Preview each page by clicking on thumbnails.

howToUse.title: Download
howToUse.description: Download individual SVG files or all pages as a ZIP archive.

useCases.title: Logos and Graphics
useCases.description: Extract logos and vector graphics from PDFs for use in design software.

useCases.title: Technical Diagrams
useCases.description: Convert technical drawings and diagrams to scalable SVG format.

useCases.title: Web Development
useCases.description: Create web-ready SVG files from PDF content for responsive websites.

useCases.title: Print at Any Size
useCases.description: Generate vector graphics that print perfectly at any size.

faq.question: What is SVG format?
faq.answer: SVG (Scalable Vector Graphics) is a vector image format that can be scaled to any size without losing quality. It is widely used for logos, icons, and web graphics.

faq.question: Will the SVG be truly vector?
faq.answer: The SVG contains a high-resolution rendering of the PDF page. For PDFs with vector content, you get crisp output at any scale.

faq.question: Can I preview before downloading?
faq.answer: Yes! Click on any thumbnail to see a full-size preview of the SVG. You can download individual pages or all at once.

faq.question: What resolution should I choose?
faq.answer: Higher resolution (216 or 288 DPI) produces larger, more detailed SVGs. Use lower settings for faster processing and smaller files.

zh.title: PDF转SVG
zh.metaDescription: 将PDF页面转换为SVG矢量图形。任意尺寸完美缩放，支持单独导出每页。
zh.description:
PDF转SVG将您的PDF文档的每一页转换为可缩放矢量图形（SVG）。SVG是一种矢量格式，在任何缩放级别或打印尺寸下都能保持完美质量。

与光栅格式（JPG、PNG）不同，SVG图形在缩放时永远不会变得模糊。这使其非常适合标志、图表、技术图纸以及任何需要以不同尺寸显示的内容。

预览每个转换后的页面，可以单独下载或作为ZIP文件下载。所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档完全隐私。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击浏览选择。

howToUse.title: 配置选项
howToUse.description: 设置分辨率质量，可选择指定页面范围。

howToUse.title: 预览和转换
howToUse.description: 点击转换进行处理。点击缩略图预览每个页面。

howToUse.title: 下载
howToUse.description: 下载单个SVG文件或将所有页面打包为ZIP压缩包。

useCases.title: 技术图纸

useCases.title: 网页开发
useCases.description: 从PDF内容创建网页友好的SVG文件，用于响应式网站。

useCases.title: 任意尺寸打印
useCases.description: 生成可以任意尺寸完美打印的矢量图形。

faq.question: 什么是SVG格式？
faq.answer: SVG（可缩放矢量图形）是一种可以缩放到任意尺寸而不损失质量的矢量图像格式。它广泛用于标志、图标和网页图形。

faq.question: SVG是真正的矢量吗？
faq.answer: SVG包含PDF页面的高分辨率渲染。对于具有矢量内容的PDF，您可以在任何缩放级别获得清晰的输出。

faq.question: 可以在下载前预览吗？
faq.answer: 可以！点击任何缩略图查看SVG的完整尺寸预览。您可以下载单个页面或全部下载。

faq.question: 应该选择什么分辨率？
faq.answer: 更高的分辨率（216或288 DPI）会产生更大、更详细的SVG。使用较低设置可以加快处理速度并获得更小的文件。

en.title: Extract Images from PDF
en.metaDescription: Extract all embedded images from PDF files. Download individually or as a ZIP archive. Filter small images automatically.
en.description:
Extract Images from PDF retrieves all embedded images from your PDF documents. Download high-quality images individually or as a convenient ZIP archive.

The tool automatically filters out small images like icons and decorations based on customizable size thresholds. Process multiple PDFs at once for efficient batch extraction.

All extraction happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.description: Drag and drop one or more PDF files or click to select from your device.

howToUse.title: Set Filter Options
howToUse.description: Adjust minimum width, height, and file size to filter out unwanted small images.

howToUse.title: Extract Images
howToUse.description: Click Extract to find all embedded images in your PDFs.

howToUse.title: Download
howToUse.description: Download individual images or all images as a ZIP archive.

useCases.title: Photo Recovery
useCases.description: Extract photos and images embedded in PDF documents for reuse or archiving.

useCases.title: Asset Collection
useCases.description: Gather all graphics and images from PDF reports, presentations, or brochures.

useCases.title: Content Repurposing
useCases.description: Extract images from PDFs to use in other documents, websites, or presentations.

faq.question: What image formats are extracted?
faq.answer: Images are extracted in their native format (JPEG, PNG, etc.) when possible, or converted to PNG for raw image data.

faq.question: Why are some images missing?
faq.answer: Small images below the size threshold are filtered out. Adjust the filter settings to extract smaller images.

faq.question: Can I extract from scanned PDFs?
faq.answer: Scanned PDFs typically contain the scan as one large image per page. Use PDF to Image tool instead for page-by-page conversion.

zh.title: 从PDF提取图片
zh.metaDescription: 从PDF文件中提取所有嵌入的图片。支持单独下载或打包成ZIP下载。自动过滤小尺寸图片。
zh.description:
从PDF提取图片工具可以从您的PDF文档中检索所有嵌入的图片。您可以单独下载高质量图片，也可以将所有图片打包成ZIP压缩包一次性下载。

该工具会根据可自定义的尺寸阈值自动过滤掉小图片（如图标和装饰图案）。支持批量处理多个PDF文件，高效便捷。

所有提取过程都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的文档保持私密和安全。

howToUse.title: 提取图片
howToUse.description: 点击提取按钮，查找PDF中所有嵌入的图片。

howToUse.title: 下载
howToUse.description: 单独下载每张图片，或将所有图片打包成ZIP压缩包下载。

useCases.title: 图片恢复
useCases.description: 从PDF文档中提取照片和图片，用于重复使用或存档。

useCases.title: 素材收集
useCases.description: 收集PDF报告、演示文稿或宣传册中的所有图形和图片。

useCases.title: 内容再利用
useCases.description: 从PDF中提取图片，用于其他文档、网站或演示文稿。

faq.question: 提取的图片是什么格式？
faq.answer: 图片会尽可能保持原始格式（JPEG、PNG等）提取，原始像素数据会转换为PNG格式。

faq.question: 为什么有些图片没有提取出来？
faq.answer: 小于设定尺寸阈值的图片会被过滤掉。调整过滤设置可以提取更小的图片。

faq.question: 可以从扫描的PDF中提取图片吗？
faq.answer: 扫描的PDF通常每页包含一张大图片。如需逐页转换，请使用"PDF转图片"工具。

en.title: Find and Redact
en.metaDescription: Search and redact text across all pages of a PDF. Batch redact sensitive information like account numbers, names, and more.
en.description:
Find and Redact allows you to search for specific text, numbers, or patterns across all pages of your PDF and redact all matching occurrences at once. Perfect for removing sensitive information like account numbers, names, addresses, or any confidential data.

Preview all matches before applying redactions, and selectively choose which occurrences to redact. Supports case-sensitive search, whole word matching, and regular expressions for advanced pattern matching.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Search for Text
howToUse.description: Enter the text, number, or regex pattern you want to find and redact.

howToUse.title: Review and Select
howToUse.description: Preview all matches and select which ones to redact.

howToUse.title: Apply Redaction
howToUse.description: Customize redaction appearance and apply to selected matches.

useCases.title: Privacy Compliance
useCases.description: Redact personal information to comply with GDPR, HIPAA, or other regulations.

useCases.title: Legal Documents
useCases.description: Remove confidential data from legal documents before sharing.

useCases.title: Financial Records
useCases.description: Redact account numbers, SSNs, or financial data from statements.

faq.question: Is redaction permanent?
faq.answer: Yes, redaction permanently removes the underlying text. The original content cannot be recovered. Always keep a backup of the original file.

faq.question: Can I redact images or scanned text?
faq.answer: This tool works with text-based PDFs. For scanned documents, you would need to use manual area-based redaction.

faq.question: Can I customize the redaction appearance?
faq.answer: Yes, you can set the redaction color, add borders, and optionally include replacement text like "[REDACTED]".

faq.question: How does regex search work?
faq.answer: Enable "Use Regular Expression" to search using regex patterns. For example, \d{4}-\d{4}-\d{4}-\d{4} to find credit card numbers.

zh.title: 查找并遮盖
zh.metaDescription: 搜索并批量遮盖PDF中的敏感文本。支持正则表达式匹配账号、姓名等敏感信息。
zh.description:
查找并遮盖允许您在PDF的所有页面中搜索特定文本、数字或模式，并一次性遮盖所有匹配项。非常适合删除敏感信息，如账号、姓名、地址或任何机密数据。

在应用遮盖前预览所有匹配项，并选择性地选择要遮盖的出现次数。支持区分大小写搜索、全词匹配和正则表达式以进行高级模式匹配。

所有处理都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的文档保持私密和安全。

useCases.title: 法律文档
useCases.description: 在共享前从法律文档中删除机密数据。

useCases.title: 财务记录
useCases.description: 从报表中遮盖账号、社保号或财务数据。

faq.question: 遮盖是永久的吗？
faq.answer: 是的，遮盖会永久删除底层文本。原始内容无法恢复。请始终保留原始文件的备份。

faq.question: 可以遮盖图像或扫描文本吗？
faq.answer: 此工具适用于基于文本的PDF。对于扫描文档，您需要使用基于区域的手动遮盖。

faq.question: 可以自定义遮盖外观吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以设置遮盖颜色、添加边框，并可选择包含替换文本如"[已遮盖]"。

faq.question: 正则表达式搜索如何工作？
faq.answer: 启用"使用正则表达式"以使用正则模式搜索。例如，\d{4}-\d{4}-\d{4}-\d{4}可查找信用卡号。

en.title: PDF to Word
en.metaDescription: Convert PDF to editable Word (DOCX) documents. Preserve formatting and layout.
en.description:
PDF to Word converts your PDF documents into editable Microsoft Word (DOCX) files. The tool preserves the original layout, formatting, images, and text flow.

Easily edit your PDF content in Word without retyping. Perfect for contracts, reports, and resumes.

All conversion happens locally in your browser using WebAssembly technology, ensuring your documents never leave your device.

howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Convert
howToUse.description: Wait for the conversion process to complete.

howToUse.description: Download your fully editable DOCX file.

useCases.description: Convert PDF contracts to Word for editing and revision.

useCases.title: Resume Updates
useCases.description: Update old PDF resumes by converting them to Word.

useCases.title: Content Repurposing
useCases.description: Extract content from PDF reports for other documents.

faq.question: Is formatting preserved?
faq.answer: Yes, the tool aims to preserve layout, fonts, and images as closely as possible.

faq.question: Can I convert scanned PDFs?
faq.answer: Scanned PDFs will be converted as images in Word unless you use OCR first.

faq.question: Is it compatible with Word?
faq.answer: Yes, the output is a standard .docx file compatible with Microsoft Word and Google Docs.

zh.title: PDF转Word
zh.metaDescription: 将PDF转换为可编辑的Word文档（DOCX）。保留原始布局、格式和图像。
zh.description:
PDF转Word工具可将您的PDF文档转换为完全可编辑的Microsoft Word (DOCX)文件。该工具采用先进的解析技术，能够最大限度地保留原始文档的排版、字体、表格和图像。

无需重新打字，即可轻松修改PDF内容。非常适合处理合同、报告、简历以及任何需要深度编辑的文档。

所有转换均在您的浏览器本地完成，确保您的商业机密和个人隐私不会被泄露。

faq.question: 转换后的排版会乱吗？
faq.answer: 对于标准文档，我们的算法能实现极高的还原度。但如果原PDF是由图片生成的扫描件，建议先使用OCR工具。

faq.question: 支持WPS或Google Docs吗？
faq.answer: 生成的.docx文件是国际标准格式，完全兼容Microsoft Word、WPS Office、Google Docs和LibreOffice。

faq.question: 转换受保护的PDF吗？
faq.answer: 如果PDF设置了打开权限，您需要先使用"解密PDF"工具移除密码。

en.title: PDF to Markdown
en.metaDescription: Convert PDF to Markdown format. Extract text and preserve formatting like headings and lists.
en.description:
PDF to Markdown converts your PDF documents into clean, well-structured Markdown files. The tool intelligently extracts text content and attempts to preserve formatting like headings, lists, and paragraphs.

Perfect for converting PDF documents to editable formats for documentation, note-taking, or content management systems that support Markdown.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Configure Options

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Click Convert to generate your Markdown file and download.

useCases.title: Documentation

useCases.description: Migrate PDF content to CMS platforms that support Markdown.

faq.question: Is formatting preserved?

faq.question: Does it work with scanned PDFs?

zh.metaDescription: 将PDF转换为Markdown格式。提取文本并保留标题和列表等格式。

PDF转Markdown将您的PDF文档转换为干净、结构良好的Markdown文件。该工具智能提取文本内容，并尝试保留标题、列表和段落等格式。

非常适合将PDF文档转换为可编辑格式，用于文档编写、笔记记录或支持Markdown的内容管理系统。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密和安全。

useCases.description: 将PDF内容迁移到支持Markdown的CMS平台。

faq.question: 格式会保留吗？

en.title: PDF Booklet Creator
en.metaDescription: Create booklet layouts from PDF for printing. Arrange pages for saddle-stitch binding with multiple grid options.
en.description:
PDF Booklet Creator arranges your PDF pages into booklet layouts ready for print-and-fold production. Perfect for creating brochures, zines, booklets, and saddle-stitched publications.

Choose from various grid modes (1x2, 2x2, 2x4, 4x4), paper sizes, and orientation options. The tool automatically handles page imposition for proper folding sequence.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.description: Upload the PDF document you want to convert to a booklet.

howToUse.title: Choose Layout

howToUse.title: Create and Download
howToUse.description: Generate the booklet layout and download for printing.

useCases.title: Brochures
useCases.description: Create fold-ready brochures from standard PDF documents.

useCases.title: Zines

useCases.title: Event Programs
useCases.description: Create professional program booklets for events.

faq.question: What is saddle-stitch binding?
faq.answer: Saddle-stitch is a binding method where folded sheets are nested and stapled through the fold.

faq.question: Which grid mode should I use?
faq.answer: 1x2 is standard for booklets. Use 2x2 or larger for multi-up printing to save paper.

faq.question: Can I preview the layout?

en.title: Font to Outline
en.metaDescription: Remove font dependencies from PDF documents by converting pages to high-quality images. Ensures compatibility across all systems.
en.description:
Font to Outline removes all font dependencies from your PDF by converting each page into high-quality rasterized content. This ensures your document looks exactly the same on any system, even if the original fonts are not installed.

The tool renders each page at your chosen DPI (150-600), removing embedded fonts while preserving the exact visual appearance. Optionally, you can add an invisible text layer to maintain searchability.

This is essential for print preparation, cross-platform compatibility, and avoiding font licensing issues when sharing documents. All processing happens locally in your browser.

useCases.description: Remove embedded fonts to avoid licensing concerns when distributing documents.

faq.question: How does this work?
faq.answer: The tool renders each page at high resolution (your chosen DPI) and recreates the PDF from these images, removing all font dependencies while preserving visual appearance.

faq.question: Can I still select text after conversion?
faq.answer: By default, no. Text becomes part of the image. However, you can enable "Preserve searchable text" to add an invisible text layer for search and copy functionality.

faq.question: What DPI should I use?
faq.answer: 300 DPI is recommended for print-quality output. 150 DPI is sufficient for screen viewing and produces smaller files. 600 DPI is for highest quality but creates large files.

faq.question: Will file size increase?
faq.answer: File size depends on DPI and content. 150 DPI usually produces smaller files, 300 DPI may increase size, 600 DPI significantly increases size. Compression is automatically applied.

faq.question: Is this reversible?
faq.answer: No, font data is permanently removed. Keep a backup of the original if you need editable text with the original fonts.

faq.question: What about vector graphics?
faq.answer: Vector graphics (shapes, lines) in the original PDF will be converted to raster along with text. The visual quality is preserved at your chosen DPI.

该工具以您选择的DPI（150-600）渲染每个页面，删除嵌入的字体同时保留确切的视觉外观。可选地，您可以添加不可见的文本层以保持可搜索性。

这对于打印准备、跨平台兼容性以及在共享文档时避免字体许可问题至关重要。所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行。

faq.answer: 该工具以高分辨率（您选择的DPI）渲染每个页面，并从这些图像重新创建PDF，删除所有字体依赖同时保留视觉外观。

faq.answer: 默认情况下不能。文本成为图像的一部分。但是，您可以启用"保留可搜索文本"以添加不可见的文本层用于搜索和复制功能。

faq.question: 我应该使用什么DPI？
faq.answer: 打印质量输出推荐300 DPI。屏幕查看150 DPI就足够了，并产生较小的文件。600 DPI用于最高质量但会创建大文件。

faq.question: 文件大小会增加吗？

faq.question: 这是可逆的吗？
faq.answer: 不，字体数据被永久删除。如果需要使用原始字体的可编辑文本，请保留原始文件的备份。

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

faq.question: What are PDF layers (OCG)?
faq.answer: Optional Content Groups (OCG) are layers in a PDF that can be shown or hidden. They are commonly used in CAD drawings, maps, and complex documents.

PDF Reader is a full-featured PDF viewer that lets you read and navigate PDF documents directly in your browser. No software installation required - just upload your PDF and start reading.

Navigate between pages, zoom in and out, rotate the view, and use fullscreen mode for distraction-free reading. You can also print documents or download them for offline access.

All viewing happens locally in your browser. Your documents are never uploaded to any server, ensuring complete privacy.

faq.question: Is my document secure?
faq.answer: Yes, your document is processed entirely in your browser and is never uploaded to any server.

faq.question: Can I annotate or edit the PDF?
faq.answer: This tool is for viewing only. Use our Sign PDF or Annotate PDF tools for editing.

faq.question: Does it work on mobile devices?
faq.answer: Yes, the PDF Reader works on all devices with a modern web browser.
